name: SSH Guard for Agents
tagline: SSH monitoring + auto-block unknown IPs. Telegram alerts. No dependencies.
description:
Protects your VPS from unauthorized SSH access and keeps you informed in real time.

Sends a Telegram alert on every SSH login. Whitelisted IPs pass silently; unknown IPs trigger an alert and get auto-blocked via iptables/ufw. Message batching prevents Telegram flood.

Includes: ssh-alert.sh (PAM hook), send-queue.sh (flood-safe sender), sync-whitelist.sh (multi-server sync), service-healthcheck.sh (systemd timer), onboard-server.sh (one-command setup).

Bash only. No external APIs, no Python, no Node. Works on any Ubuntu/Debian VPS.
